description_long: This object is a modern, compact toilet with a smooth, rounded design and a closed lid. The cistern is integrated into the back, forming a single continuous unit with the bowl and base, which is typical of floor-mounted toilets. The exterior is finished in a uniform light gray or off-white color, giving it a clean and hygienic appearance. The seat and lid are both present and appear to be made of a slightly different material, likely plastic, compared to the ceramic body. The base is broad and stable, designed to be securely fixed to the floor. No flush mechanism or additional accessibility features are visible from any angle.
description: A modern, floor-mounted toilet with a smooth, rounded design, closed lid, and integrated cistern in a light gray color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed lid, integrated cistern, and the symmetrical, rounded shape of the toilet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the seat, lid, and the continuous curve from the cistern to the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cistern and the solid, broad base.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat, lid, and the seamless connection between the cistern and bowl.
